<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this short and honest. -->

## What & why
What does this change, and what problem does it solve?

## Checklist
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and the relevant [standards](standards/00-manifest.md).
- [ ] Tests added/updated next to the code (`cd src && python3 -m pytest .` passes).
- [ ] Docs updated in the **same** change (module `README.md` and, for a significant change, an ADR in `docs/adrs/`).
- [ ] Respects the invariants: model-proposes/code-disposes · content-blind sensors · local-first · consent-gated mutation · no silent truncation.

## Notes
Anything reviewers should know — trade-offs, follow-ups, things you're unsure about.
